summary: Made two surgical entry-side seam edits. The opening household image now carries more of the schoolhouse fallout from chapter 4, and Della's arrival wording was tightened to avoid near-duplicate handoff phrasing while preserving the same action and stakes. The exit into chapter 6 already tracked cleanly through Gabriel's name and the overnight aftermath, so the closing sequence was left intact.
edits: Linked June's attention to the road to the day's talk reaching the house, strengthening the chapter 4 to chapter 5 handoff.
Trimmed repeated carryover phrasing in Della's arrival so the seam reads as continuation instead of restatement.
Kept the closing handoff to chapter 6 unchanged because the Gabriel reveal already sets up the next chapter's pressure cleanly.
